item.description:
What's New in 3.3

Features

  • Multi-tier Claude usage tracking: Live token counts now flow from the OAuth endpoint (60-second refresh), fall back to the tmux socket probe, and can optionally read from the claude.ai Web API using a browser session cookie. Full Disk Access guidance surfaces in Preferences when Web API mode is active.

Bug Fixes

  • Claude Usage: Stale OAuth caches are now invalidated on 401 responses; 429 rate-limit responses are routed through the Web API fallback instead of blocking the refresh cycle.
  • Claude Usage: Safari cookie path corrected for sandboxed and legacy macOS filesystem layouts.
  • Claude Usage: Guarded system-preferences URL construction to eliminate a force-unwrap crash path.
  • Usage display: Codex auto-probe cooldown no longer masquerades as UI freshness — Cockpit and in-app surfaces now age correctly after /status probes.
  • Usage (Codex): Rollout logs with rate_limits: null are treated as limit-unavailable instead of reusing stale session-file percentages, re-enabling the /status probe fallback for newer Codex session formats.
  • Agent Cockpit: Pinned HUD limits footer rebuilds from live usage-model changes, preventing stale percentages from persisting.
  • Agent Cockpit: Weekly reset times now format consistently as Day H:MM AM/PM for both Codex and Claude.
  • Agent Cockpit: Cockpit-only and pinned-mode launch now runs the full startup bootstrap, so Claude session names resolve without the main window.

Changes

  • Preferences: Usage Tracking pane overhauled — popup data-source picker, overflow-free segmented controls, vertically stacked option toggles.
  • Claude Usage: Refresh-interval constant unified across all tracking tiers; org UUID validation hardened to prevent bad identifiers from poisoning the cache.

Full release notes: https://github.com/jazzyalex/agent-sessions/releases/tag/v3.3

What's New in 3.2.1

Features

  • Agent Cockpit HUD: Usage limits footer now shows Claude API reset time and rate-limit state, with idle reason classification surfaced on the status dot.
  • Agent Cockpit HUD: Claude OAuth usage tracking with tmux socket fallback for probe-less environments.

Bug Fixes

  • Agent Cockpit HUD: Eliminated transient "—" flash when iTerm2 probe returns an empty result.
  • Agent Cockpit: Three probe stability fixes — tmux socket leak on teardown, excessive re-probe on focus change, and HUD visibility loss after backgrounding.
  • Agent Cockpit HUD: Three display fixes — stale session titles after tab switch, empty-state flash on first load, and wrong-tab focus on direct open.
  • Session discovery: Prevent two processes sharing the same working directory from claiming the same session log.
  • Session discovery: Infer Claude session log from project directory when `lsof` socket lookup misses it.
  • Session discovery: Assign distinct sessions to multiple presences in the same workspace.

Reminder: What You Got in 3.2

  • OpenCode: Added read-only SQLite backend support for OpenCode v1.2+, including automatic detection between `~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db` and legacy per-file JSON session storage. Preferences → OpenCode now shows the detected backend.
  • Agent Cockpit / Menu Bar: OpenCode live sessions now participate in shared active/waiting summaries, background session lookup, and iTerm-based presence detection alongside Codex and Claude.
  • OpenCode: Main-window session rows now show live-state dots for active and waiting OpenCode sessions.
  • OpenCode: iTerm busy-state detection is more reliable, reducing false idle/open classification while a session is still working.

Full release notes: https://github.com/jazzyalex/agent-sessions/releases/tag/v3.2.1
